name: Mori-nu "Lite" Eggless Egg Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 package Mori-Nu Lite Tofu, firm (10.5 oz), drained
1 tablespoon honey or other natural sweetener
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble tofu into a small bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine vinegar, mustard, honey, and turmeric. Mix thoroughly.
3. Pour the mixture over the crumbled tofu.
4. Add celery, onion, parsley, paprika, and pepper.
5. Mix thoroughly.
6. Refrigerate approximately 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Makes three 1/2 cup servings.
